# BRC-20

> A primary-source Bitcoin Universe developer manual for BRC-20.

## Protocol model

- Chain: Bitcoin
- Carrier: JSON text inscription
- Core operations: deploy, mint, transfer
- State model: indexer-derived balance state
- Transfer model: two transactions, create a transferable inscription then send it

Deploy initializes a ticker policy and does not change balance. A valid mint credits only the first owner of its mint inscription. A valid transfer inscription reserves an amount from available balance. The first movement of that transfer inscription to another owner credits the recipient and settles the transfer.

## Canonical payloads

Deploy:

    {"p":"brc-20","op":"deploy","tick":"ordi","max":"21000000","lim":"1000"}

Mint:

    {"p":"brc-20","op":"mint","tick":"ordi","amt":"1000"}

Transfer inscription:

    {"p":"brc-20","op":"transfer","tick":"ordi","amt":"100"}

## Original rules

- The first valid deployment claims the ticker. Tickers are case-insensitive.
- The original standard describes a four-letter ticker.
- max supply is limited to unsigned 64-bit range.
- dec defaults to 18 and cannot exceed 18.
- lim is an optional per-mint limit.
- A mint may be partially accepted only up to remaining supply by the original rules.
- Transfer amount must not exceed available balance when the transfer is inscribed.
- Available balance equals overall balance minus valid active transfer inscription amounts.
- Same-block event order is confirmation order.
- Sending a transfer inscription to the current owner cancels the transferable and restores available balance.
- A transfer inscription should be sent only to an Ordinals-compatible destination.

## Reader agreement

The wallet, builder, and indexer must agree on the transfer inscription and its first movement. The OPI indexer repository is an Apache-2.0 implementation reference that states it follows official BRC-20 protocol rules. It is not presented here as a new source of protocol consensus.

## Primary sources

- Original docs: https://docs.bitcoints.org/brc-20
- Original examples: https://docs.bitcoints.org/brc-20/brc-20-examples
- OPI indexer: https://github.com/unisat-wallet/brc20-swap-indexer
- Pinned implementation source: https://github.com/unisat-wallet/brc20-swap-indexer/blob/60565f3eb2ca9aa8fc1a787b3eab3a98d3bee1f1/modules/brc20_index/brc20_index.py

## Asset provenance

Official documentation icon, social image, and blue visual tokens are documented in ATTRIBUTION.md.
